meta.purpose: Automation small-batch research log for PL Commentary Bank. This file records source-backed findings before any destructive or broad database promotion.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Only rows with explicit official/high-trust source support may be promoted to data/database.json. Ambiguous identity or incomplete result context must remain outside confirmed histories. Current-event Numata rows are event results, not prior histories for the same event-relative view.

primarySourcesChecked: HPA 2026 Numata Bench Press A/B/C result速報 PDF
HPA 2026 Spring Ebetsu Classic Powerlifting result PDF
Web search for HPA/JPA/Goodlift-indexable exact-name matches
batchScope.openPrCheck: Open PR #52 concerns event-relative previous-history display logic and has failing data validation; this batch adds an isolated research log only and does not touch app layout, runtime logic, database.json, or research-candidates.json.

confirmedFindings.identityBasis: Same Japanese name, birth year 1991, and BURSTLIMIT/BURST LIMIT KITAMI affiliation across two HPA official PDFs.

athletes.promotionRecommendation: Safe future database promotion candidate for one confirmed prior CL-PL history. This run records it in an isolated batch log only because database.json is minified and an open validation-failing PR exists; avoid broad file rewrite until validation contract is inspected.

notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.reason: This run intentionally avoided rewriting minified data/database.json while PR #52 has data validation failures. The one confirmed prior-history candidate is fully source-backed and isolated here for later schema-safe promotion.
notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.safeNextStep: Promote 松原 幹 2026-04-25 江別CLPL history after confirming the database history schema and resolving current validation status, then continue with Lot 16-20.
